title: rubus bifrons var. decipiens
intro: Rubus bifrons var. decipiens, also known as the Himalayan raspberry or Himalayan thimbleberry, is a type of bramble in the Rubus genus. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and supporting cardiovascular health. Himalayan raspberry can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a popular ingredient in natural remedies.
